def negative_module_mixes_constants_types_helpers_and_execution_flow():
    rule_id = "module_mixes_constants_types_helpers_and_execution_flow"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag modules that combine unrelated responsibilities and become hard to scan."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
